gpdf HTML Rendering Demo

This document demonstrates the Phase 4-A features of gpdf's HTML/CSS rendering engine.

Text Formatting

gpdf supports bold, italic, underline, and strikethrough text. These can be combined freely.

Block Elements

This is an info box created with a styled div element. It has a blue left border and light blue background.

Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication. — Leonardo da Vinci

Lists

Unordered list:

  • Pure Go, zero dependencies
  • HTML/CSS to PDF conversion
  • CJK text support

Ordered list:

  1. Parse HTML
  2. Apply CSS cascade
  3. Generate PDF

Horizontal Rule

Content above the rule.

Content below the rule.

Preformatted Text

func main() {
    pdf, _ := gpdf.FromHTML(html)
    os.WriteFile("out.pdf", pdf, 0644)
}

Generated by gpdf — Pure Go PDF Library
